meta.title: Guardians of the Future — Platform Proposal

hero.subtitle: A civic action initiative that helps communities turn care for place into visible environmental impact.

problem.title:
Community impact work is
invisible and hard to prove
points: Groups do meaningful work, but can't show its scale or credibility
No shared data foundation means impact claims feel anecdotal
Recognition systems gamify participation instead of reflecting real contribution
Without visibility, it's impossible to build a collective case for systemic change

vision.statement: What if every community action was visible, provable, and part of a collective movement for environmental and social change?
vision.description: Guardians of the Future makes impact honest, meaningful, and worth proving — transforming scattered efforts into a unified, credible case for systemic change from the ground up.

understood.statement: A platform where community groups track and prove their real-world environmental and social impact together - transparently, meaningfully, building a collective case for change from the ground up.

pillars.title: One Data Foundation
pillars.description: Every feature is a query on one shared Impact Record. Clean, auditable, and honest.

pillars.title: Community First
pillars.description: No leaderboards, no competition. Recognition that reflects what was actually done.

pillars.title: Honest Impact
pillars.description: Numbers are estimates with stated methodology. Transparency is the credibility mechanism.

features.title: Circles
features.description: Teams with a shared identity, impact history, and profile. No individual accounts — groups are the atomic unit.

features.title: Challenge Library
features.description: Pre-built action templates with stated impact methodologies. Circles adopt challenges and report progress.

features.title: Impact Records
features.description: Every action creates a timestamped, immutable row. One clean data foundation. Every view is a query on this table.

features.title: Recognition System
features.description: Markers earned silently based on actual contribution. No leaderboards, no competition — just honest acknowledgment.

cards.title: Joins
cards.body: Clicks a magic link. Enters name, city, language. No password. Inside in under two minutes.

cards.title: Adopts
cards.body: Her Circle browses the Challenge Library and adopts the Neighbourhood Compost Sprint.
cards.aside: A Circle: a profile, a team, and a shared impact history.

cards.title: Reports
cards.body: 30 days later — 24kg composted. She submits a Level 2 report with photo. Admin approves within 48hrs.
cards.aside: The trade-off between ease and weight is transparent and chosen.

cards.title: Impact
cards.body: The Impact Record gets its first row. 24kg → 12kg CO₂e avoided. Stored at write time. Honest.
cards.aside: One clean data foundation. Every view is a query on this table.

cards.title: Recognised
cards.body: She visits her profile. Finds the First Impact marker waiting. Silently earned. Discovered. Real.
cards.aside: Markers crystallise something that already happened.

tech.title: Built for scale, speed, and trust

stack.technologies: Supabase · PostgreSQL · Row-Level Security · Real-time subscriptions
Single Impact Record table · Immutable data · Transparent methodology
Vercel · Automatic deployments · Edge functions · 99.9% uptime SLA

tech.note: Designed for auditability. Every action tracked. Every calculation transparent. No black boxes.

phases.description: Live users · Real impact · Support & iteration

steps.title: Phase 1: Onboard 3-5 Circles
steps.description: Handpicked community groups already doing impact work. Diverse contexts (urban, rural, schools, NGOs).

steps.title: Phase 2: Active Support
steps.description: Weekly check-ins, rapid iteration based on feedback. Fix blockers within 48 hours.

steps.title: Phase 3: Validate Model
steps.description: Do groups complete challenges? Does the data make sense? Is impact provable and meaningful?

steps.title: Phase 4: Scale Decision
steps.description: By October, we know if this works. Data-driven decision to expand or pivot.

metrics.title: How we'll know it's working

metrics.label: Adoption
metrics.description: 3-5 active Circles by end of pilot

metrics.label: Completion
metrics.description: 60%+ of adopted challenges result in submitted reports

metrics.label: Data Quality
metrics.description: Reports validated within 48 hours, <5% rejection rate

metrics.label: User Satisfaction
metrics.description: Net Promoter Score >40 from Circle leaders

metrics.label: Impact Visibility
metrics.description: Every Circle can export a credible impact report

metrics.note: If we hit these by October, we scale. If we don't, we learn why and adjust.

investment.title: The Numbers
investment.note: Payment tied to phase delivery · 50% deposit to commence · All amounts excl. VAT

closing.line: Every guardian starts somewhere. Let's start here.
closing.subtitle: Guardians of the Future · Platform Pilot · March 2026
closing.team: Nhlanhla Masuku | Tshakule Nemalili | Ndinannyi Siminya
